The model favors Algeria at 35%, a narrow lead over Austria's 33% win probability. The underdog advantage is modest; the two sides sit within 2 percentage points of each other in the forecast, suggesting a tightly matched encounter.

The 31.6% draw probability indicates a genuine three-way contest. The spread across outcomes is flat enough that no single result dominates; all three scenarios carry meaningful likelihood. This competitive structure points to a match where either team's performance could tip the balance, without clear separation in expected quality.

No sportsbook consensus is available yet, so direct model-market comparison cannot be made at this stage. The dashboard will update when bookmaker odds emerge.
